benefits.description: myostatin inhibition for systemic and localized muscle growth
BPC-157 and TB-500 for injury recovery
TB-500 for blood flow and muscle recovery
Kisspeptin-10 elevates natural LH/FSH levels which indirectly increases testosterone

protocol_notes: Hypothetical stack recommendation for bodybuilders mid-30s or older. Post also recommends: Creatine, multivitamin (methylcobalamin, P5P, folate, mixed tocopherols, zinc, iodine, selenium), anserine/carnosine, Alpha-GPC, Hydroxyproline, electrolyte-enhanced water, metformin (30 min before meals), IPH-AGAA, taurine, Demoxytocin (after workouts), Carbetocin, Cialis (before workout), 5-amino-1MQ (with NMN/NAD+ and food), BCAA, rhbFGF, glutamine peptides + L-glutamine, b-endorphin, TVS167, fiber, CES device (1-4 Hz before bed for sleep/hormones, 8-12/12-40/40-100 Hz before gym for focus). Author states Kisspeptin-10 should not require PCT and is better alternative to HCG. Notes myostatin inhibitors work similarly to androgens but without requiring anabolic steroids.
